function.message: I reviewed the next inbox item and could not safely complete it because the request’s explicit file list is not fully available in the workspace. Four listed purchase records are present, but one listed item is missing, so I did not perform partial OCR.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read required workflow/schema docs before task work, followed explicit-file-list precedence and completeness rule, and avoided partial mutations when one required listed file was unavailable.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md explicitly requires OCR on five exact paths. Only four could be read successfully. Since one explicitly listed required item is missing and cannot be substituted, completing the task would require guessing or partial execution, so clarification is required.
